metadata.title: Note Companion (prev. File Organizer 2000)
metadata.description: Note Companion (prev. File Organizer 2000) Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: Are you sure you want to clear your download history? This won't delete any files from your vault, but will reset the 'synced' status for all files.
ast.target: 确定要清除下载历史记录吗？这不会删除您保险库中的任何文件，但会重置所有文件的“已同步”状态。

ast.name: confirm
ast.source: This note has already been enhanced with this recording. Re-enhancing will replace the existing enhanced sections. Continue?
ast.target: 此笔记已使用此录音进行过增强。重新增强将替换现有的增强部分。是否继续？

ast.target: 当新文件通过收件箱处理时，自动重命名它们。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Automatically append similar tags to new files during inbox processing.
ast.target: 在收件箱处理期间，自动为新文件附加相似标签。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Instructions for how files should be renamed based on their content.
ast.target: 根据文件内容如何重命名的说明。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Improve AI-generated titles by providing examples from your vault (uses 20 random titles).
ast.target: 通过提供库中的示例来改进AI生成的标题（使用20个随机标题）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add similar tags in frontmatter instead of inline.
ast.target: 在前置元数据中添加相似标签，而非内联。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Custom instructions for generating tags for your notes.
ast.target: 为笔记生成标签的自定义说明。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provide custom instructions for determining which folders to place your notes in.
ast.target: 提供自定义说明，以确定将笔记放入哪些文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provide instructions for how to process and describe images in your documents.
ast.target: 提供如何处理和描述文档中图像的说明。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allows you to keep track of the changes made by file Organizer.
ast.target: 允许您跟踪文件组织器所做的更改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable detailed logging for troubleshooting. This may impact performance.
ast.target: 启用详细日志记录以进行故障排除。这可能会影响性能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable the generation of atomic notes in the assistant sidebar.
ast.target: 在助手侧边栏中启用原子笔记生成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Please check your license key in the plugin settings.
ast.target: 请在插件设置中检查您的许可证密钥。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turn editor selection into its own linked note
ast.target: 将编辑器所选内容转换为独立的链接笔记

ast.name: error
ast.source: No text selected in the note. Select text before running extract; the chat Selection chip shows what will be used when the note is not focused.
ast.target: 笔记中未选择文本。运行提取前请先选择文本；当笔记未聚焦时，聊天选择芯片会显示将要使用的内容。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Could not find the source note for your saved selection. Select text in the note again.
ast.target: 无法找到已保存选择对应的源笔记。请重新在笔记中选择文本。

ast.name: error
ast.source: The note changed since you selected that text. Open the note and select the block again.
ast.target: 自您选择该文本后笔记已发生更改。请打开笔记并重新选择块。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Invalid url: received a Promise instead of a string
ast.target: 无效的URL：收到的是Promise而非字符串

ast.name: error
ast.source: url is required and must be a string
ast.target: url是必需的且必须为字符串

ast.name: error
ast.source: API key is missing; cannot fetch URL

ast.name: error
ast.target: 服务器未返回页面内容

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Open a note and select text, or use scope: 'document'.
ast.target: 打开笔记并选择文本，或使用范围：'document'。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Select text in the editor or use scope: 'document'.
ast.target: 在编辑器中选择文本或使用范围：'document'。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Open a note or pass a valid filePath from the Attached file paths.
ast.target: 打开笔记或从附加文件路径中传递有效的filePath。

ast.name: hint
ast.source: Pass filePaths from the Attached file paths for scope 'files'.
ast.target: 从附加文件路径中传递filePaths以使用范围'files'。

ast.name: message
ast.source: This file is part of an ignored folder and will not be processed.
ast.target: 此文件属于被忽略的文件夹，将不会被处理。

ast.name: message
ast.source: To process an image or audio file, move it to the Note Companion Inbox Folder (e.g. for image text extraction or audio transcription).
ast.target: 要处理图像或音频文件，请将其移动到 Note Companion 收件箱文件夹（例如，用于图像文本提取或音频转录）。

ast.name: message
ast.source: No active file found to append content to
ast.target: 未找到可追加内容的活跃文件

ast.name: message
ast.source: Failed to append content to file

ast.name: message
ast.source: Cannot link a note to itself
ast.target: 无法将笔记链接到自身

ast.name: message
ast.target: 用户已取消文件重命名

ast.name: message
ast.target: 用户已取消合并（文件已存在）

ast.name: message
ast.source: No results found in ScreenPipe for the given criteria.
ast.target: 在ScreenPipe中未找到符合给定条件的结果。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid data content. Content string is not a base64-encoded media.
ast.target: 无效的数据内容。内容字符串不是base64编码的媒体。

ast.name: message
ast.source: prompt or messages must be defined
ast.target: 必须定义 prompt 或 messages

ast.name: message
ast.source: prompt and messages cannot be defined at the same time
ast.target: prompt 和 messages 不能同时定义

ast.name: message
ast.target: prompt 必须是一个字符串

ast.name: message
ast.source: messages must be an array of CoreMessage or UIMessage
ast.target: messages 必须是 CoreMessage 或 UIMessage 的数组

ast.name: message
ast.source: Enum values are not supported for object output.
ast.target: 对象输出不支持枚举值。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Enum values are not supported for array output.
ast.target: 数组输出不支持枚举值。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Enum values are required for enum output.

ast.name: message
ast.source: No object generated: the model did not return a response.
ast.target: 未生成对象：模型未返回响应。

ast.name: message
ast.source: No object generated: the tool was not called.
ast.target: 未生成对象：未调用工具。

ast.name: message
ast.source: No object generated: could not parse the response.
ast.target: 未生成对象：无法解析响应。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 推理签名缺少推理内容

ast.name: name
ast.target: 自定义文件夹确定说明

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将选择内容添加到聊天

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将选择内容提取到新笔记

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Enter your File Organizer License Key
ast.target: 输入您的文件整理器许可证密钥

ast.name: title
ast.target: 复制所有日志到剪贴板

ast.name: title
ast.source: Undo file processing and move back to inbox
ast.target: 撤销文件处理并移回收件箱

ast.name: title
ast.target: 会话时间范围（来自 ScreenPipe）

ast.name: title
ast.target: 证据：窗口和 URL 主机
